description: Multiple SQL injection vulnerabilities in (1) aeNovo, (2) aeNovoShop and (3) aeNovoWYSI allow remote attackers to execute arbitrary SQL code via (a) the password parameter in control.asp, and (b) the strSQL parameter in search.asp, which can enable XSS attacks in resulting error messages.
